title: Junior Frontend Developer at IBM India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at IBM India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? IBM India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
